runTitle: Playwright MCP Production QA - Frontend + AI Assistant v8.11.0 broad baseline refresh
coveredSurfaces: landing render with v8.11.0 badge after settle
404 route renders product fallback page with v8.11.0 footer
/login minimal header without profile menu and guest CTA/privacy link visible
guest PIN login 4231 succeeds and returns to landing
system start countdown begins at 4초 and reaches /system-boot -> /dashboard
dashboard render with 15 total / 14 online / 1 warning / 0 risk and resource top5
server detail modal opens for lb-haproxy-dc1-01 and all 3 tabs switch: 종합 상황 / 성능 분석 / 로그 & 네트워크
ESC closes the server detail modal and returns to dashboard
AI sidebar opens from resource alert context with engine Ready state
AI sidebar retry completes actionable Cloud Run response for lb-haproxy-dc1-01 CPU 73% context
/api/ai/supervisor/stream/v2 POST returns 200 SSE with ui-message-stream + X-AI-Latency-Ms=292
direct AI stream summary identifies 15 total / 14 healthy / 1 warning with lb-haproxy-dc1-01 CPU 74% warning
browser console errors 0 during settled landing/login/dashboard/modal/core AI verification flow
Vibe Coding modal tabs still open and CI/CD pipeline content remains aligned to local hook -> GitLab push -> validate -> deploy -> production
skippedSurfaces: active alerts / topology / log explorer modal-detail pack beyond server detail modal
exact Vibe Coding current-tool copy cleanup (@storybook/react-vite -> @storybook/nextjs-vite) was observed as known non-blocking drift and excluded from release fail count

expertAssessments.rationale: Core route, dashboard, modal, and AI core paths were exercised on live production with concrete UI and API checkpoints.

Health/version/system probes and a direct supervisor SSE request confirmed production observability on the documented X-AI-Latency-Ms path; Server-Timing and X-AI-Processing-Ms remained absent, which matches the current Vercel SSOT.

AI core surface eventually succeeded, but the first live sidebar prompt returned 'Rate limit exceeded' before an immediate retry completed successfully. Fullscreen/Reporter/Analyst variants remain outside this broad pack.
expertAssessments.nextAction: Stabilize the first-attempt production AI path against transient rate-limit failures, then rerun an AI-focused targeted pack.

expertAssessments.rationale: The promoted production deployment is healthy and usage remains within budget, but user-facing AI reliability is still sensitive to transient rate-limit behavior on the first request.
expertAssessments.nextAction: Inspect Cloud Run/provider quota and limiter behavior for first-hit production prompts before treating v8.11.0 as fully green.

usageChecks.summary: Current billing period reviewed during broad production QA; effective 3.9425 USD, billed 0.0000 USD, chargeCount 3654, no unexpected billed usage spike.

pendingImprovements.title: Complex Cloud Run AI verification path should complete without rate-limit failure in production
pendingImprovements.note: Broad QA on production hit 'Rate limit exceeded' on the first live sidebar prompt from the lb-haproxy warning context; immediate retry succeeded and direct /api/ai/supervisor/stream/v2 SSE probe later returned 200 with X-AI-Latency-Ms=292, so the failure is intermittent but user-facing.

pendingImprovements.title: 랜딩 첫 진입 시 bootstrap auth copy 비노출 처리
pendingImprovements.note: release-blocking 아님. Production first paint twice showed visible '인증 확인 중... (Vercel 환경)' copy before the landing hero settled, so the earlier hidden-copy fix is no longer holding on the live landing path.

notes: Compared with QA-20260406-0246: landing/login/dashboard/server-detail modal/Vibe Coding CI-CD content remained green on v8.11.0, but first-paint landing copy and first-attempt AI reliability regressed.
Vibe Coding current-tool text still references '@storybook/react-vite 기반'; this matches the user-reported non-blocking cleanup item and was not used to fail the release-facing QA run.
mode audit: direct supervisor SSE probe showed requestedMode=auto and resolvedMode=multi via auto_complexity.
AI timing observability passed through X-AI-Latency-Ms=292; X-AI-Processing-Ms and Server-Timing were absent, which matches the documented Vercel production rule.
Historical artifact debt acknowledged on 2026-04-08: later repro/fix evidence exists separately, but this original broad run intentionally remains without retrofitted artifacts.

artifactDebt.reason: This release-facing broad regression run was recorded without durable artifact paths. Later repro and fix evidence exists, but attaching later-dated files would misrepresent the original run state.
